## Summary
- Describe the change briefly.

## Scope
- [ ] No backend API contract changes
- [ ] No DB schema changes
- [ ] Responsive UI changes only (or list exceptions)

## Responsive Checklist
- [ ] 360px mobile: no page-level horizontal overflow
- [ ] 768px tablet: filters/actions stay usable and do not overlap
- [ ] 1024px+ desktop: existing density/layout preserved
- [ ] Tables: mobile card view or controlled horizontal scroll applied intentionally
- [ ] Drawers/modals: primary actions remain visible on mobile
- [ ] Touch targets: interactive controls are at least 44px
- [ ] Dark mode readability verified

## Validation
- [ ] Verified key screens manually in browser responsive mode
- [ ] Ran relevant tests/checks (list commands below)

### Commands
```bash
# Example:
# php artisan test
# npm run build
```
